extract: Slither Wing (Japanese: チヲハウハネ Chiwohauhane) is a dual-type Bug/Fighting Paradox Pokémon introduced in Generation IX. While it is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon, Slither Wing is said to be either an ancient relative of Volcarona or a version of it from a parallel timeline. It also has a futuristic counterpart, Iron Moth.
